calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter is called twiced. No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Karen D. Jones.

Granted in full.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Off Calendar

Request To Set Case For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Poonam D. Mehta, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION,
No appearance by defaulted defendant KAREN D. JONES, an individual,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-100 dismissed without prejudice.
Witness: Janet Fitzgerald sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $47,871.15
Pre-Judgment Interest: $5,618.63
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $524.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $56,838.78

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
